function.message: I can’t fully complete this inbox request yet because item 5 is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_01_24__eur_000050__bill__hearthline_sensor_bundle.md` (not found, and no matches by search). The other four files exist, but I stopped to avoid a partial result. Please confirm the correct 5th path (or confirm it should be skipped), and I’ll proceed.
function.rulebook_notes: Inbox items are requests, not canonical truth; stop without mutation when blocked on missing support. Do not silently complete partial tasks.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction requires OCR of five specific files, but the fifth listed path is absent (read failed; search found zero matches). Completing only four would be an incomplete/partial fulfillment, so clarification is required before any writes.
